# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: Fixing the Navbar Level Display Bug
- Summary: We've identified and are addressing a bug where the level display in the navbar isn't updating correctly. Your progress visibility is important to us!
- Slug: bug-fix-focus-navbar-level-display
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-bug-fix-focus-navbar-level-display

- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: We are actively working on resolving an issue where the user's level display in the navigation bar is not accurately reflecting their current level. This fix is a priority to ensure accurate user profile information is always visible.
- CTA: Check your profile for the latest updates!
- Visual brief: A screenshot of the CodeGrind navbar with a subtle visual indicator highlighting the incorrect level display, possibly with a 'bug fix in progress' overlay.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
